description: Establish a system to monitor user retention rates over 30 days to ensure the platform retains users after initial engagement.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the retention monitoring system is established, WHEN users engage with the platform, THEN retention rates should be tracked and reported over a 30-day period.

description: Conduct a full GDPR compliance audit to address concerns regarding lawful data processing, consent mechanisms, and data retention policies.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the audit team is assembled, WHEN they review the data processing activities, THEN they should identify and document all compliance gaps.

description: Implement granular consent mechanisms that allow users to opt-in or opt-out of specific data processing activities to ensure GDPR compliance.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the consent mechanisms are implemented, WHEN users access their settings, THEN they should see options to opt-in or opt-out of specific data processing activities.

description: Implement a data ingestion pipeline that captures browsing history, click patterns, scroll depth, and time-on-page metrics for each authenticated user. The pipeline must handle at minimum 50k events/second at peak.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the user is authenticated, WHEN they browse content, THEN their browsing history, click patterns, and scroll depth are captured and streamed to the data lake in real-time.

description: Build a recommendation engine that uses accumulated user profile data to serve personalized content suggestions, targeting a 20% improvement in content CTR.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN user profile data is available, WHEN the recommendation engine processes this data, THEN it should serve personalized content suggestions with a target CTR improvement of 20% within 60 days.

description: Provide clear information to users about what data is being tracked and how it is used, enhancing transparency.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the transparency section is live, WHEN users access it, THEN they should see detailed information on data tracking practices.

description: Create an API and batch export system that shares anonymized user profile segments with advertising partners while ensuring compliance with privacy regulations.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the data export system is implemented, WHEN advertisers request data, THEN they should receive anonymized cohort-level data without individual identifiers.

description: Build a user-facing dashboard that displays collected behavioral data, allowing users to see their inferred interests and opt out of specific tracking categories.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the user accesses their dashboard, WHEN they view their data, THEN they should see inferred interests and have options to opt out of specific tracking categories.

description: Link user activity across mobile app and web browser sessions using deterministic and probabilistic matching to enable a unified user profile.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user is logged in on multiple devices, WHEN they perform actions, THEN their activities should be linked to create a unified profile.

description: Implement a mechanism for collecting user feedback on privacy settings and data tracking transparency to inform future iterations.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the feedback mechanism is live, WHEN users provide feedback, THEN their responses should be collected and analyzed for future improvements.

description: Redesign the privacy settings interface to simplify user interactions and enhance clarity regarding data tracking options.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the new privacy settings interface is implemented, WHEN users access their settings, THEN they should find it easier to modify their preferences.

story_title: Monitoring and Alerting for User Engagement Metrics
description: Implement monitoring and alerting systems for key user engagement metrics to ensure performance and identify issues early.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the monitoring system is in place, WHEN user engagement metrics change, THEN alerts should be triggered for significant deviations.
